title: glyceria × ottawensis
intro: Glyceria × ottawensis, also known as Ottawa mannagrass, is a hybrid grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Glyceria × ottawensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. In herbal preparations, it is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
